Banner.Description: I am a versatile and detail-oriented Sr. Software Engineer with over 5+ years of experience specializing in Angular, React.js, and Node.js. I build scalable web and mobile applications across healthcare, fintech, and AI-driven systems, with hands-on experience integrating LLM and MCP Server into intelligent chatbot architectures.
AboutMe.Title: About Me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: In 5+ years of experience I have covered many roles: Sr. Software Engineer, Angular Developer, React Developer, and Full Stack Developer. I love crafting clean, responsive interfaces and scalable backend solutions that solve real-world problems.

I have delivered enterprise-grade applications across diverse domains — from Hospital Information Systems and Banking Payment Platforms to AI Chatbot Systems and E-Commerce portals. I am experienced with the full SDLC, Agile Scrum workflows, and cross-functional team collaboration.
Currently, I am working on an AI-powered conversational system that combines OndeWo, MCP Server middleware, and LLM to deliver intelligent, hybrid rule-based and AI-driven chat interactions at scale.
Some of the technologies I have trained and worked with include (but are not limited to):
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Sr. Software Engineer
Description: Designed and developed an AI chatbot system using OndeWo as the conversation platform, MCP Server as middleware, and LLM for intelligent open-ended responses.
OndeWo handles intent detection and dialog flow for structured, rule-based interactions.
MCP Server orchestrates business logic, third-party integrations, and API routing.
LLM is integrated for contextual and open-ended conversational capabilities.
Architected a scalable, secure hybrid system supporting both rule-based and AI-driven chat flows.
Ensured modular, maintainable design with clean separation of concerns across the pipeline.

Experience.Jobs.Title: React Developer
Description: Developed full-featured user and admin eCommerce portals using React.js.
Implemented product listing, shopping cart, order tracking, and secure authentication flows.
Used React Hooks, Redux Toolkit, and React Router for state management and navigation.
Built role-based admin modules with responsive UI and optimized runtime performance.
Integrated RESTful APIs with the backend for seamless data operations and real-time updates.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Angular Developer
Description: Developed and maintained the Hospital Information Management System (HIMS) web application using Angular 14.2.0 and PrimeNG.
Delivered a responsive, user-friendly interface covering patient workflows, appointments, billing, and reporting.
Collaborated directly with clients to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
Handled both front-end and back-end development, including database management for end-to-end functionality.
Followed Agile Scrum methodology and SDLC process for efficient, on-time project delivery.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Full Stack Developer
Description: Developed and maintained a Banking Payment Management System for web and mobile using IONIC 6.16.1, Angular 12.2.0, and Java backend.
Implemented the Credit Card Management System and E-Wallet Management System with secure payment flows.
Integrated Java-based REST APIs with the Angular/Ionic frontend for smooth, secure transactions.
Wrote unit tests for web and mobile modules to ensure high code quality, reliability, and performance.
Ensured cross-platform compatibility and responsive design across web and mobile devices.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Junior Developer
Description: Developed an Attendance & Monitoring Management System mobile application using IONIC 6.16.1 and Angular 11.2.2.
Created an HRMS Web Application with HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap 4 for effective employee data management.
Managed and developed WordPress web applications for multiple clients.
Contributed to digital marketing and social media campaigns to support business growth.

FeatureProjects.Title: My Projects
FeatureProjects.Label: Highlighted Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: AI Chatbot System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: An intelligent conversational AI system built at Bluexkye. Uses OndeWo for intent detection and dialog flow, MCP Server as middleware for business logic and integrations, and LLM for open-ended contextual responses. Supports both rule-based and AI-driven interactions in a scalable and secure architecture.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: HIMS – Hospital Information Management System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A comprehensive hospital management web application developed at Medimaze Solutions. Built with Angular 14 and PrimeNG, it covers patient management, appointment scheduling, billing, and reporting with a fully responsive interface. Handled full-stack development including database design and client requirement gathering.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Banking Payment Management System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A secure, cross-platform web and mobile banking application developed at Proclink Consulting Services. Built with IONIC 6.16.1, Angular 12.2.0, and a Java backend, it delivers a seamless experience across both web browsers and mobile devices. The system includes a fully functional Credit Card Management module — enabling card issuance, transaction history, limit controls, and statement generation — alongside an E-Wallet Management System for digital wallet top-ups, peer-to-peer transfers, and balance tracking. Java-based REST APIs were tightly integrated with the Angular/Ionic frontend to ensure secure, real-time payment operations. Implemented OAuth2 / OIDC authentication for role-based access control across user and admin flows. Wrote comprehensive unit tests using Jest to maintain high code quality and reliability throughout the project lifecycle.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: eCommerce Portal (User & Admin)
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A full-featured eCommerce platform developed at NeoSoft with separate user and admin portals. Includes product listing, cart management, order tracking, and role-based authentication. Built with React.js, Redux Toolkit, and React Router for efficient state management.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: HRMS Web Application
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A Human Resource Management System built to streamline employee workflows. Features employee onboarding, attendance tracking, leave management, and performance reporting with a clean, responsive UI built using modern web standards.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Attendance & Monitoring System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A mobile-first application for real-time employee attendance tracking and monitoring, developed at AnkHub. Built with IONIC 6.16.1 and Angular 11, focused on intuitive interfaces for field staff and management dashboards with reliable data sync.

OtherProjects.Title: More Projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: ShopEasy – Mobile Shopping App
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: A feature-rich E-Commerce Mobile App built with Ionic and Angular for Android & iOS. Features product browsing, cart, secure checkout, order tracking, and profile management. Integrated REST APIs for authentication, payments, and real-time data with optimized performance and reusable components.

OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Title: Angular Data Dashboard
OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Description: A collection of reusable Angular components featuring configurable charts, reactive data tables, and complex form validators using Angular Material, NgRx for state management, and RxJS for reactive streams.

OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Title: Countries Viewer
OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Description: Interface that consumes a countries REST API to display a list of countries with detail views, region filters, and name search. Features a dark/light theme toggle built with Angular and RxJS.

OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Title: FAQ Accordion
OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Description: Frequently asked questions accordion component with smooth Angular animations and clean UI. Demonstrates reusable component design and Angular animation API usage.

OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Title: Profile Card Component
OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Description: A minimal, responsive profile card UI component designed from a Figma mockup. Built with Angular and SASS, demonstrating pixel-perfect implementation from design to code.

OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Title: WordPress Custom Plugins
OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Description: Developed custom WordPress plugins and templates for client projects, including ACF-based layouts, custom post types, and functional JavaScript enhancements for dynamic content interactions.

OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Title: Social Proof Section
OtherProjects.Projects.hidden.Description: A single-page design challenge implemented from Figma, featuring testimonials and star ratings in a CSS Grid layout with entry animations.

Contact.Title: Get In Touch
Contact.Content: I am currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project idea, want to collaborate on something exciting, or just want to connect — feel free to reach out. I will get back to you as soon as possible!
